org.jlab.epsci.ersap.std.cli

Class ConfigVariable.Builder

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.jlab.epsci.ersap.std.cli.ConfigVariable.Builder
  • Enclosing class:
    ConfigVariable

    public static final class ConfigVariable.Builder
extends java.lang.Object
    Helps creating a new ConfigVariable.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ConfigVariable build()
      Creates the variable.
      ConfigVariable.Builder withCompleter(org.jline.reader.Completer completer)
      Sets the shell completer to show the tab-completion candidates when setting the variable to a new value.
      ConfigVariable.Builder withExpectedValues(java.lang.Object... values)
      Sets the expected values for the variable.
      ConfigVariable.Builder withInitialValue(java.lang.Object value)
      Sets the default value for the variable.
      ConfigVariable.Builder withParser(java.util.function.Function<java.lang.String[],java.lang.Object> parser)
      Sets the function to transform the shell arguments into the value stored in the variable.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Method Detail

      • withParser

        public ConfigVariable.Builder withParser(java.util.function.Function<java.lang.String[],java.lang.Object> parser)
        Sets the function to transform the shell arguments into the value stored in the variable.

        Given a variable v, the following expression must be true: 

         parser.apply(new String[]{v.getValue().toString()}).equals(v.getValue())
        Parameters:
        parser - a function to parse the value from shell arguments
        Returns:
        this builder

      • withInitialValue

        public ConfigVariable.Builder withInitialValue(java.lang.Object value)
        Sets the default value for the variable. When the shell configuration is reset, the variable will be set to this value.
        Parameters:
        value - the default value
        Returns:
        this builder

      • withExpectedValues

        public ConfigVariable.Builder withExpectedValues(java.lang.Object... values)
        Sets the expected values for the variable. The shell will present them as tab-completion candidates when setting the variable to a new value.
        Parameters:
        values - the expected values of the variable
        Returns:
        this builder

      • withCompleter

        public ConfigVariable.Builder withCompleter(org.jline.reader.Completer completer)
        Sets the shell completer to show the tab-completion candidates when setting the variable to a new value.
        Parameters:
        completer - the shell completer for the possible variable values
        Returns:
        this builder

      • build

        public ConfigVariable build()
        Creates the variable.
        Returns:
        the new variable.
